title: Gemini batch review — rc.25 final review pass
description: Run a single Gemini batch review at the end of rc.25 per project convention (memory: 'Batch review at end of multi-task plans'). Review scope: all files touched in rc.25 (schema + skill + hook + AGENTS.md + doctor + tests + CHANGELOG). Deliverable: code-review.md with severity-tagged findings + go/no-go SHIP IT verdict.

files.change: Generated by Gemini delegate output — captures findings + verdict.

implementation: Compute scope: git diff between rc.25 branch and rc.24 head (exclude planning-context.md / dogfood-evidence.md from review).

Spawn maestro delegate to gemini with role=review:
  ```
  maestro delegate "PURPOSE: Multi-dimensional code review of rc.25 archive skill redesign; success = all critical/high findings explicit + go/no-go verdict
  TASK: Review schema variant correctness | Review SKILL.md logic coherence (Phase ordering + entry-context detection + outcome state machine) | Review hook copy bilingual rendering | Review AGENTS.md policy clarity | Review doctor subcommand UX | Verify backward-compat across pre-rc.25 events.jsonl | Check anti-pattern: hidden globals, sleep loops, suppressed errors
  MODE: analysis
  CONTEXT: @packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts @packages/cli/templates/hooks/archive-hint.cjs @packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md @.fabric/AGENTS.md @packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts @packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts @CHANGELOG.md
  EXPECTED: code-review.md with sections: 1) Critical findings (must fix before ship); 2) High findings (should fix); 3) Medium findings (recommend fix); 4) Low/style (optional); 5) SHIP IT verdict (GO / NO-GO with reasoning)
  CONSTRAINTS: Focus on rc.25 changes | Skip pre-existing code quality | Skip planning artifacts
  " --to gemini --mode analysis --rule analysis-review-code-quality --cd "/Users/wepie/Desktop/personal-projects/pcf"
  ```
Wait for callback; capture full output.
If verdict is NO-GO: parse Critical findings, create remediation tasks (typically loop back to TASK-XX with fix scope).
If verdict is GO (SHIP IT): proceed to rc.25 tag + npm publish (handled outside this task).

reference.pattern: rc.22 / rc.23 batch review at end (one-shot Gemini delegate per memory: feedback_review_batching)
reference.examples: rc.22 SHIP IT verdict — full Gemini output captured as code-review.md is the precedent.

rationale.chosen_approach: Single end-of-chain Gemini batch review (per project memory). Cheaper + higher-signal than per-task reviews.
alternatives_considered: Per-task review (rejected per memory: feedback_review_batching prefers single batch)
Skip review (rejected: project standard for RC ship gate)
decision_factors: Gemini's strength is cross-cutting consistency checks
Single review = single GO/NO-GO decision moment
rationale.tradeoffs: Critical findings late in chain may require multiple TASK reopens; mitigation: high task quality from plan-checker P4 reduces critical finding rate.

criteria: code-review.md has 5 severity sections (Critical / High / Medium / Low / Verdict)
Commit msg: 'chore(rc25): Gemini batch review code-review.md (TASK-13)'
